'''shathudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feague|feague]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-th-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feague|feague]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shathudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæthidith|shæthidith]] || [[word:shæthidij|shæthidij]] || [[word:shæthidish|shæthidish]] || [[word:shæthidi|shæthidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shathuthuduth|shathuthuduth]] || [[word:shathuthuduj|shathuthuduj]] || [[word:shathuthudush|shathuthudush]] || [[word:shathuthudu|shathuthudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shathuduth|shathuduth]] || [[word:shathuduj|shathuduj]] || [[word:shathudush|shathudush]] || [[word:shathudu|shathudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shathufduth|shathufduth]] || [[word:shathufduj|shathufduj]] || [[word:shathufdush|shathufdush]] || [[word:shathufduf|shathufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shathuduthu|shathuduthu]] || [[word:shathuduju|shathuduju]] || [[word:shathudushu|shathudushu]] || [[word:shathuduku|shathuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shathuduth|shathuduth]] || [[word:shathuduj|shathuduj]] || [[word:shathudush|shathudush]] || [[word:shathudu|shathudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shathuduthul|shathuduthul]] || [[word:shathudujul|shathudujul]] || [[word:shathudushul|shathudushul]] || [[word:shathudukul|shathudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shathuduthuthu|shathuduthuthu]] || [[word:shathudujuju|shathudujuju]] || [[word:shathudushushu|shathudushushu]] || [[word:shathuduku|shathuduku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shathuduthun|shathuduthun]] || [[word:shathudujun|shathudujun]] || [[word:shathudushun|shathudushun]] || [[word:shathudukun|shathudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shathuduthuoro|shathuduthuoro]] || [[word:shathudujuoro|shathudujuoro]] || [[word:shathudushuoro|shathudushuoro]] || [[word:shathudukuoro|shathudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
